data.four_set_effect: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Electro by 35%.

circlet_of_logos.desc: The crown given to the Thundersoother for defeating the Beast of Thunder that had been wreaking havoc upon the land.
circlet_of_logos.title: Thundersoother's Diadem

flower_of_life.desc: A flower that blooms even amidst ferocious thunder and lightning. To this day, it still grants courage to travelers in thunderstorms.
flower_of_life.title: Thundersoother's Heart

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: The wine goblet from which the Thundersoother, who defeated the Beast of Thunder, once drank violet lightning.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Thundersoother's Goblet

plume_of_death.desc: The feather of a predatory bird that soars through lightning storms. It was said to have been adopted as an insignia by the legendary hero who pacified thunder and lightning.
plume_of_death.title: Thundersoother's Plume

sands_of_eon.desc: A timepiece kept by the hero who conquered thunder and lightning. The tiny shards of Electro crystal within flow back and forth with the passing of time.
sands_of_eon.title: Hour of Soothing Thunder

list.desc: A purple flower plucked in a thunderstorm.</br>Whoever wears it will no longer fear the thunder and lightning.</br>This flower blossoms only in thunderstorms, and never withers despite the constant rain.</br>This is the Flower of Thunder. Kneeling before it, the Thundersoother plucked it with reverence.</br>The Thundersoother wore this flower on his chest at all times as he fearlessly faced the thunder and lightning.</br>Even when fighting the fierce Beast of Thunder, his resolve never wavered.</br>To the Thundersoother, wearing this purple flower may have been merely an act of whimsy,</br>but to travelers, the flower was the source of the unfaltering resolve that conquered the thunder.</br>
list.title: Thundersoother's Heart

list.desc: A very ancient diadem.</br>It shines with the light of the pacified lightning.</br>The ferocious Beast of Thunder</br>once enslaved people with its mighty lightning.</br>But its lightning existed only in a flash,</br>and like the lightning, its mightiness soon disappeared.</br>The Thundersoother defeated the beast in a lightning storm.</br>He claimed this diadem as his trophy.</br>But the past can never be fully pacified.</br>
list.title: Thundersoother's Diadem

list.desc: A goblet that once belonged to the Thundersoother.</br>Perhaps its former owner once used it to drink the thunder.</br>Mighty as he was, the Thundersoother was a mere mortal with human feelings.</br>Rage and ecstasy would come and go in a flash, just like the pounding thunder.</br>This goblet witnessed not only the feats of the Thundersoother, but also his sorrow and laughter.</br>From this goblet was drunk the wine used in the sacrificial slaying of the Thundersoother's family.</br>From this goblet came the courage that helped the Thundersoother venture forth into the beast's cave.</br>From this goblet came the sole source of companionship for the Thundersoother, who spent his final days in solitude.</br>
list.title: Thundersoother's Goblet

list.desc: An insignia made in the shape of the plume of a falcon that soared through the storms.</br>Its wearer can almost feel the booming of thunder and the heat of a volcano.</br>Fearing neither the thunder nor the volcano,</br>the falcon left its plume in the burnt woods.</br>The Thundersoother fashioned an amethyst insignia in the plume's likeness.</br>The purple insignia shimmered with light under the gaze of enemies.</br>On this small object lightning glittered,</br>as if to foreshadow the downfall of the Beast of Thunder.</br>Like the falcon, the Thundersoother conquered both thunder and flames,</br>and eventually beheaded the Beast of Thunder.</br>
list.title: Thundersoother's Plume

list.desc: An hourglass the Thundersoother once used. Flowing within it is not sand, but tiny Electro shards.</br>The shards shatter and flow down as time passes, then merge together at the bottom of the hourglass.</br>The Thundersoother who defeated the Beast of Thunder crafted this hourglass from amethyst.</br>The passage of time is just like lightning. It bursts through the sky and is gone in a flash.</br>Even the Thundersoother could not conquer the flash of time.</br>Within this hourglass, even thunder and lightning have to obey the never-changing law of time.</br>In the hourglass, the shards shatter and merge countless times while time silently flashes by.</br>Observing this taught the Thundersoother about the cycle of life and death. Empowered with this knowledge, he was able to defeat the beast.</br>
list.title: Hour of Soothing Thunder
